meta.title: Curation Schedule Management
meta.description: Manage weekly curation schedules and hall of fame lists

title: Weekly Hall of Fame Schedule
description: Curate the weekly hall of fame with primary and secondary curation lists
empty: No schedules found for this week

primaryHall.title: Primary Hall of Fame

secondaryHall.title: Secondary Hall of Fame

fill.title: Auto-fill this week
fill.description: Refill the schedule with random tier-biased picks not featured recently. Appends to empty slots only.

notifications.none: No new curations added (halls already full or pool exhausted)
